record.field: { "version": "18.5.10", "sheets": [ { "id": "rep-operations-dashboard", "name": "Dashboard", "colNumber": 8, "rowNumber": 48, "rows": { "0": { "size": 34 }, "2": { "size": 28 }, "14": { "data": { "title": { "text": "Visits by status", "bold": true }, "background": "#FFFFFF", "legendPosition": "top", "metaData": { "groupBy": ["status_bucket"], "measure": "task_count", "order": null, "Credit / return value by rep", "bold": true }, "background": "#FFFFFF", "legendPosition": "top", "metaData": { "groupBy": ["rep_name"], "measure": "credit_return_value", "order": null, "resModel": "groupBy": ["rep_id"], "orderBy": [] }, "type": "odoo_bar", "actionXmlId": "reza_field_service_buttons.action_reza_fsm_rep_operation_report", "dataSets": [{}], "verticalAxisPosition": "left", "stacked": false, "chartId": "chart-credit-return-by-rep" }, "offset": { "x": 0, "y": 14 }, "col": 4, "row": 15 } ], "tables": [], "areGridLinesVisible": true, "isVisible": true, "headerGroups": { "ROW": [], "COL": [] }, "comments": {} } ], "styles": { "1": { "textColor": "#2F4F4F", "bold": true, "fontSize": 22 }, "2": { "textColor": "#2F4F4F", "bold": true, "fontSize": 14, "fillColor": "#F3F6F6" }, "3": { "textColor": "#434343", "fontSize": 11 } }, "formats": {}, "borders": {}, "revisionId": "START_REVISION", "uniqueFigureIds": true, "settings": { "locale": { "name": "English (US)", "code": "en_US", "thousandsSeparator": ",", "decimalSeparator": ".", "dateFormat": "mm/dd/yyyy", "timeFormat": "hh:mm:ss", "formulaArgSeparator": ",", "weekStart": 7 } }, "pivots": { "1": { "type": "ODOO", "context": { "group_by": [] }, "domain": [["task_level", "=", "visit"], ["exception_type", "!=", "ok"]], "id": "1", "measures": [ { "id": "task_count", "fieldName": "task_count", "userDefinedName": "Visits" }, { "id": "overdue_count", "fieldName": "overdue_count", "userDefinedName": "Overdue" }, { "id": "missing_worksheet_count", "fieldName": "missing_worksheet_count", "userDefinedName": "Missing Worksheet" } ], "model": "reza.fsm.rep.operation.report", "name": "Exception list", "sortedColumn": { "measure": "task_count", "order": "desc", "domain": [] }, "formulaId": "1", "columns": [{ "fieldName": "exception_type" }], "rows": [{ "fieldName": "rep_id" }], "fieldMatching": {} }, "2": { "type": "ODOO", "context": { "group_by": [] }, "domain": [["task_level", "=", "visit"]], "id": "2", "measures": [ { "id": "done_count", "fieldName": "done_count", "userDefinedName": "Done" }, { "id": "open_count", "fieldName": "open_count", "userDefinedName": "Open" }, { "id": "cancelled_count", "fieldName": "cancelled_count", "userDefinedName": "Cancelled" }, { "id": "credit_return_value", "fieldName": "credit_return_value", "userDefinedName": "Credit / Return Value" } ], "model": "reza.fsm.rep.operation.report", "name": "Rep performance", "sortedColumn": { "measure": "done_count", "order": "desc", "domain": [] }, "formulaId": "2", "columns": [], "rows": [{ "fieldName": "rep_id" }], "fieldMatching": {} } }, "pivotNextId": 3, "lists": { "1": { "columns": ["exception_type", "rep_name", "task_id", "partner_id", "planned_date", "days_overdue"], "domain": [["task_level", "=", "visit"], ["exception_type", "!=", "ok"]], "model": "reza.fsm.rep.operation.report", "context": {}, "orderBy": [ { "name": "exception_priority", "asc": true }, { "name": "days_overdue", "asc": false }, { "name": "planned_date", "asc": true } ], "id": "1", "name": "Attention list", "fieldMatching": {} } }, "listNextId": 2, "globalFilters": [], "customTableStyles": {}, "chartOdooMenusReferences": { "chart-exceptions-by-rep": "industry_fsm.fsm_menu_reporting", "chart-status-by-rep": "industry_fsm.fsm_menu_reporting", "chart-worksheet-compliance":
